channel.title: LCallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from LCallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Tragedy Averted As Suspect's Plan to Torch ICE Facility Fails to Ignite
Red state auditor's report flags Democratic governor's 'concerning' spending on 'luxury' expenditures
item.description: Kentucky Democratic Gov. Andy Beshear is facing heat from the state's Republican auditor, who released a report outlining questionable spending from t...

item.title: Randy Fine Will Have Dems Whimpering Again As He Unleashes Bill Protecting Puppies From Radical Islam
Trump's NIH director isn't the only official wearing multiple hats during the president's second term
item.description: President Donald Trump has tasked several Cabinet members and other officials with multiple roles in his second administration, most notably Secretary...

item.title: Ex-Victoria’s Secret CEO’s lawyer caught on hot mic jokingly threatening to ‘kill’ him at Epstein deposition
item.description: Ex-Victoria’s Secret CEO Les Wexner’s lawyer was caught on a hot mic jokingly threatening to “kill" him if he continued giving long answers during his...

item.title: Could Da Bears Spike the Ball in Chicago's Face? The Exit Plan Is Getting Real
Buttigieg, Newsom, AOC top three in new 2028 poll in key presidential primary state
item.description: Pete Buttigieg leads early 2028 presidential polling in New Hampshire at 20%, ahead of Gavin Newsom and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez at 15% each.

item.title: Democrats' Newest Radical Darling Picked for State of the Union Rebuttal
CBS, NBC Caught in Fake News Narrative About FBI Director Patel's Trip to Winter Olympics
Cambodian PM says Thai forces occupying disputed land despite Trump-brokered ceasefire
item.description: Trump's Cambodia-Thailand ceasefire is under strain with Thai forces allegedly occupy Cambodian territory, displacing 80,000 locals, according to offi...
